departments.name: Public Safety
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced patrol coverage and slower emergency response times; some positions left vacant.
departments.consequenceSevere: Major reduction in patrol capacity; potential unit or shift eliminations; measurable decline in emergency response.

departments.name: Pensions & Debt Service
departments.consequenceBaseline: No reductions available; these are legally fixed obligations.
departments.consequenceSevere: Potential payment deferrals create legal exposure and long-term cost increases.

departments.name: Public Works
departments.consequenceBaseline: Deferred street and sidewalk maintenance; reduced sanitation frequency in some areas.
departments.consequenceSevere: Significant infrastructure deterioration; potential service eliminations in lower-priority corridors.

departments.name: Administration
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced staffing in HR, IT, finance, and city management support functions.
departments.consequenceSevere: Deep cuts to city capacity; slower permitting, procurement delays, reduced oversight.

departments.name: Health & Human Services
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced mental health outreach and public health programs; longer wait times.
departments.consequenceSevere: Program eliminations; significant loss of services for vulnerable populations.

departments.name: Community Services
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced library hours and community program availability; fewer funded nonprofits.
departments.consequenceSevere: Branch closures; major reductions in housing support and social services delivery.

departments.name: Parks & Recreation
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced park maintenance and recreation center hours; some programs cut.
departments.consequenceSevere: Facility closures; elimination of youth programs, aquatics, and after-school activities.

departments.name: Other Programs
departments.consequenceBaseline: Reduced special programs and contracted services.
departments.consequenceSevere: Elimination of miscellaneous city programs; loss of grant-matched services.
